title: 「Superlative」最高級句型
titleZh: 「Superlative 最高比較型（最高級句型）」

source.file: Sentence Structure 91 -「Superlative 最高比較型（最高級句型）」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be + the + adjective-est + noun + comparison group

formulas.formula: Subject + be + the + adjective-est + noun + comparison group
Subject + be + the most / least + adjective + noun + comparison group
Gerund / noun phrase + be + the best / easiest / safest + way + to + base verb
Subject + be + one of the + superlative adjective + plural noun + comparison group

example: Mia is the fastest runner in the class.
exampleZh: 米婭是班上跑得最快的跑手。

examples.en: Mia is the fastest runner in the class.
examples.zh: 米婭是班上跑得最快的跑手。
examples.highlight: the fastest runner in the class

examples.en: This is the most important topic in the exam.
examples.zh: 這是考試中最重要的題目。

examples.en: Studying is the best way to get rich.
examples.zh: 讀書是致富的最佳方法。
examples.highlight: the best way to get rich

examples.en: I am about to tell you about one of the most important topics in the exam.
examples.zh: 我正要告訴你考試中其中一個最重要的題目。
examples.highlight: one of the most important topics

meaning.zh: 最高級句型用來指出某人、事物或方法在比較範圍內具有最高或最低程度的特質。

rules.zh: 短形容詞通常加 -est；按拼字規則可加 -st、重複最後字母或把 y 改為 i。
rules.en: Short adjectives normally take -est, with the appropriate spelling changes.

rules.zh: 較長的形容詞通常使用 most；不要同時使用 most 和 -est。
rules.en: Longer adjectives normally use most; do not use most and -est together.

rules.zh: 留意 good → best、bad → worst 等不規則變化；least + adjective 表示程度最低。
rules.en: Remember irregular forms such as good → best and bad → worst; least + adjective expresses the lowest degree.

rules.zh: 最高級形容詞前通常要使用 the。
rules.en: Normally use the before a superlative adjective.

rules.zh: one of the 後面必須使用複數名詞。
rules.en: Use a plural noun after one of the.

rules.zh: 使用 in 或 of 說明比較範圍：in 常用於地方或群體，of 常用於指定數量或時間。
rules.en: Use in or of for the comparison group: in commonly introduces a place or group, while of introduces a specified set or time.

rules.zh: most 沒有 the 時可表示「大部分」，並不是最高級。
rules.en: Without the, most can mean ‘the majority of’ rather than a superlative.

benefits.zh: 直接指出哪一個人、事物或方法在某方面排名最高或最低。
benefits.en: It clearly identifies the top or bottom choice.

benefits.zh: 用一句話總結整個比較，不需要逐一比較所有選項。
the best way、the easiest way 和 the safest way 可用來直接提出建議。
benefits.en: It helps you give clear recommendations.

benefits.zh: one of the most… 能作出高度評價，同時避免聲稱它是唯一第一名。
benefits.en: One of the most… makes a strong but careful statement.

benefits.zh: 最高級句型能突出最重要的重點、最大的問題或最有效的方案。
benefits.en: It helps organise priorities in speaking and writing.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a superlative structure. Preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用最高級句型改寫以下句子，並保留原句的意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: No other building in our town is as tall as this one.
questions.promptZh: 我們鎮上沒有其他建築物像這一座那麼高。
questions.answer: This is the tallest building in our town.
questions.answerZh: 這是我們鎮上最高的建築物。
questions.highlight: This is the tallest building in our town.

questions.prompt: Mia runs faster than every other runner in the class.
questions.promptZh: 米婭跑得比班上其他所有跑手都快。
questions.answer: Mia is the fastest runner in the class.
questions.answerZh: 米婭是班上跑得最快的跑手。
questions.highlight: Mia is the fastest runner in the class.

questions.prompt: Monday was busier than every other day of the week.
questions.promptZh: 星期一比本星期其他日子都更忙碌。
questions.answer: Monday was the busiest day of the week.
questions.answerZh: 星期一是本星期最忙碌的一天。
questions.highlight: Monday was the busiest day of the week.

questions.prompt: This bag costs less than every other bag in the shop.
questions.promptZh: 這個袋子比店內其他所有袋子都便宜。
questions.answer: This is the cheapest bag in the shop.
questions.answerZh: 這是店內最便宜的袋子。
questions.highlight: This is the cheapest bag in the shop.

questions.prompt: Which route to the station is shorter than all the others? The blue route is.
questions.promptZh: 哪一條前往車站的路線比其他所有路線都短？是藍色路線。
questions.answer: The blue route is the shortest way to the station.
questions.answerZh: 藍色路線是前往車站最短的路線。
questions.highlight: The blue route is the shortest way to the station.

questions.prompt: Walking requires less effort than every other way of getting some exercise.
questions.promptZh: 步行比其他所有做運動的方法都更省力。
questions.answer: Walking is the easiest way to get some exercise.
questions.answerZh: 步行是做一些運動最容易的方法。
questions.highlight: Walking is the easiest way to get some exercise.

questions.prompt: Water is healthier than every other drink on the menu.
questions.promptZh: 水比餐牌上其他所有飲品都健康。
questions.answer: Water is the healthiest drink on the menu.
questions.answerZh: 水是餐牌上最健康的飲品。
questions.highlight: Water is the healthiest drink on the menu.

questions.prompt: Ben is younger than every other player on the team.
questions.promptZh: 本比隊內其他所有球員都年輕。
questions.answer: Ben is the youngest player on the team.
questions.answerZh: 本是隊內最年輕的球員。
questions.highlight: Ben is the youngest player on the team.

questions.prompt: In the safety test, this seat performed better than every other seat in the car.
questions.promptZh: 在安全測試中，這個座位的表現比車內其他所有座位都好。
questions.answer: This is the safest seat in the car.
questions.answerZh: 這是車內最安全的座位。
questions.highlight: This is the safest seat in the car.

questions.prompt: The library is quieter than every other place in the school.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館比校內其他所有地方都安靜。
questions.answer: The library is the quietest place in the school.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館是校內最安靜的地方。
questions.highlight: The library is the quietest place in the school.

questions.prompt: Of all the books in the series, I found this one more interesting than the others.
questions.promptZh: 在這個系列的所有書籍中，我覺得這一本比其他書更有趣。
questions.answer: This book is the most interesting one in the series.
questions.answerZh: 這本書是這個系列中最有趣的一本。
questions.highlight: This book is the most interesting one in the series.

questions.prompt: Which seat feels more comfortable than all the others in the room? The red sofa does.
questions.promptZh: 房間內哪個座位比其他所有座位都舒適？是紅色梳化。
questions.answer: The red sofa is the most comfortable seat in the room.
questions.answerZh: 紅色梳化是房間內最舒適的座位。
questions.highlight: The red sofa is the most comfortable seat in the room.

questions.prompt: Paying this bill through online banking is more convenient than using any other method.
questions.promptZh: 透過網上銀行繳付這張帳單，比使用其他任何方法都方便。
questions.answer: Online banking is the most convenient way to pay this bill.
questions.answerZh: 網上銀行是繳付這張帳單最方便的方法。
questions.highlight: Online banking is the most convenient way to pay this bill.

questions.prompt: Checking your work helps you avoid simple mistakes better than any other method.
questions.promptZh: 檢查自己的答案，比其他任何方法都更能幫助你避免簡單錯誤。
questions.answer: Checking your work is the best way to avoid simple mistakes.
questions.answerZh: 檢查自己的答案是避免簡單錯誤的最佳方法。
questions.highlight: Checking your work is the best way to avoid simple mistakes.

questions.prompt: Of the services on this route, the morning train arrives on time more often than all the others.
questions.promptZh: 在這條路線的各項服務中，早上的火車比其他班次更常準時到達。
questions.answer: The morning train is the most reliable service on this route.
questions.answerZh: 早上的火車是這條路線上最可靠的服務。
questions.highlight: The morning train is the most reliable service on this route.

questions.prompt: I have not had a meal as bad as this one at any other time this month.
questions.promptZh: 這個月內，我沒有吃過比這一餐更差的膳食。
questions.answer: This is the worst meal I have had this month.
questions.answerZh: 這是我這個月吃過最差的一餐。
questions.highlight: This is the worst meal I have had this month.

questions.prompt: Who explained the idea more clearly than everyone else in the group? Olivia did.
questions.promptZh: 誰比小組內其他所有人都更清楚地解釋這個想法？是奧莉花。
questions.answer: Olivia gave the clearest explanation in the group.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花在小組中作出了最清楚的解釋。
questions.highlight: Olivia gave the clearest explanation in the group.

questions.prompt: More visitors go to the science museum than to any other attraction in the city.
questions.promptZh: 前往科學館的訪客，比前往市內其他任何景點的訪客都多。
questions.answer: The science museum is the most popular attraction in the city.
questions.answerZh: 科學館是市內最受歡迎的景點。
questions.highlight: The science museum is the most popular attraction in the city.

questions.prompt: Friday's temperature was higher than the temperature on every other day this month.
questions.promptZh: 星期五的氣溫比這個月其他每一天都高。
questions.answer: Friday was the hottest day of the month.
questions.answerZh: 星期五是這個月最熱的一天。
questions.highlight: Friday was the hottest day of the month.

questions.prompt: Of the three phone models, this one can run for more hours between charges than the other two.
questions.promptZh: 在三款電話中，這一款每次充電後可使用的時間比另外兩款更長。
questions.answer: This phone has the longest battery life of the three models.
questions.answerZh: 在三款型號中，這部電話的電池續航時間最長。
questions.highlight: This phone has the longest battery life of the three models.

questions.prompt: Reading aloud is an effective way to improve pronunciation. Only a few other methods work as well.
questions.promptZh: 朗讀是改善發音的有效方法。只有少數其他方法同樣有效。
questions.answer: Reading aloud is one of the best ways to improve pronunciation.
questions.answerZh: 朗讀是改善發音的最佳方法之一。
questions.highlight: Reading aloud is one of the best ways to improve pronunciation.

questions.prompt: Few parts of a healthy routine matter as much as sleep.
questions.promptZh: 健康生活習慣中，很少有部分像睡眠一樣重要。
questions.answer: Sleep is one of the most important parts of a healthy routine.
questions.answerZh: 睡眠是健康生活習慣中最重要的部分之一。
questions.highlight: Sleep is one of the most important parts of a healthy routine.

questions.prompt: This bridge is older than almost every other structure in the village.
questions.promptZh: 這座橋比村內幾乎所有其他建築物都古老。
questions.answer: This bridge is one of the oldest structures in the village.
questions.answerZh: 這座橋是村內最古老的建築物之一。
questions.highlight: This bridge is one of the oldest structures in the village.

questions.prompt: Very few students in the class are as helpful as Maya.
questions.promptZh: 班上很少有學生像瑪雅一樣樂於助人。
questions.answer: Maya is one of the most helpful students in the class.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅是班上最樂於助人的學生之一。
questions.highlight: Maya is one of the most helpful students in the class.

questions.prompt: No other part of the test was as difficult as the final question.
questions.promptZh: 測驗中沒有其他部分像最後一題那麼困難。
questions.answer: The final question was the most difficult part of the test.
questions.answerZh: 最後一題是測驗中最困難的部分。
questions.highlight: The final question was the most difficult part of the test.

questions.prompt: When cycling, nothing protects your head more safely than wearing a helmet.
questions.promptZh: 踏單車時，沒有其他方法能比戴頭盔更安全地保護頭部。
questions.answer: Wearing a helmet is the safest way to protect your head while cycling.
questions.answerZh: 踏單車時，戴頭盔是保護頭部最安全的方法。
questions.highlight: Wearing a helmet is the safest way to protect your head while cycling.

questions.prompt: Taking notes makes the main points easier to remember than any other method.
questions.promptZh: 記筆記比其他任何方法都更容易讓人記住重點。
questions.answer: Taking notes is the easiest way to remember the main points.
questions.answerZh: 記筆記是記住重點最容易的方法。
questions.highlight: Taking notes is the easiest way to remember the main points.

questions.prompt: The storm was worse than every other weather event we experienced during the trip.
questions.promptZh: 這場暴風雨比我們旅程中遇到的其他所有天氣事件都惡劣。
questions.answer: The storm was the worst weather event we experienced during the trip.
questions.answerZh: 這場暴風雨是我們旅程中遇到最惡劣的天氣事件。
questions.highlight: The storm was the worst weather event we experienced during the trip.

questions.prompt: Only a few tools are as useful to language learners as this app.
questions.promptZh: 只有少數工具像這個應用程式一樣對語言學習者有用。
questions.answer: This app is one of the most useful tools for language learners.
questions.answerZh: 這個應用程式是對語言學習者最有用的工具之一。
questions.highlight: This app is one of the most useful tools for language learners.

questions.prompt: The school hall has more floor space than every other room in the building.
questions.promptZh: 學校禮堂的地面空間比大樓內其他所有房間都大。
questions.answer: The school hall is the largest room in the building.
questions.answerZh: 學校禮堂是大樓內最大的房間。
questions.highlight: The school hall is the largest room in the building.

questions.prompt: If you want to avoid heavy traffic, leaving early works better than any other plan.
questions.promptZh: 如果你想避開繁忙交通，提早出發比其他任何安排都有效。
questions.answer: Leaving early is the best way to avoid heavy traffic.
questions.answerZh: 提早出發是避開繁忙交通的最佳方法。
questions.highlight: Leaving early is the best way to avoid heavy traffic.

questions.prompt: Of the four passwords, this one is harder to guess than the other three.
questions.promptZh: 在四個密碼中，這一個比另外三個更難猜中。
questions.answer: This password is the strongest of the four choices.
questions.answerZh: 這個密碼是四個選擇中安全性最高的一個。
questions.highlight: This password is the strongest of the four choices.

questions.prompt: Using the hospital's emergency entrance gets you to the accident and emergency department faster than any other route.
questions.promptZh: 使用醫院的緊急入口，比其他任何路線都能更快到達急症室。
questions.answer: The hospital's emergency entrance is the quickest way to reach the accident and emergency department.
questions.answerZh: 醫院的緊急入口是前往急症室最快的方法。
questions.highlight: The hospital's emergency entrance is the quickest way to reach the accident and emergency department.

questions.prompt: Compared with every other plan, the new timetable is more practical for both teachers and students.
questions.promptZh: 與其他所有方案相比，新時間表對老師和學生都更實際可行。
questions.answer: For both teachers and students, the new timetable is the most practical plan.
questions.answerZh: 對老師和學生而言，新時間表是最實際可行的方案。
questions.highlight: For both teachers and students, the new timetable is the most practical plan.

questions.prompt: Which part of the park do visitors rate as more beautiful than all the others in spring? The river path.
questions.promptZh: 在春天，訪客認為公園哪個部分比其他所有地方都美麗？河畔小徑。
questions.answer: The river path is the most beautiful part of the park in spring.
questions.answerZh: 河畔小徑是公園在春天最美麗的部分。
questions.highlight: The river path is the most beautiful part of the park in spring.

questions.prompt: The broken lift caused more difficulty during the event than any other problem.
questions.promptZh: 活動期間，壞掉的升降機比其他任何問題都造成更多困難。
questions.answer: The broken lift was the biggest problem during the event.
questions.answerZh: 壞掉的升降機是活動期間最大的問題。
questions.highlight: The broken lift was the biggest problem during the event.

questions.prompt: Very few talks that day impressed the audience as much as Ava's presentation.
questions.promptZh: 當天很少有演講像艾娃的簡報一樣令觀眾留下深刻印象。
questions.answer: Ava's presentation was one of the most impressive talks of the day.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃的簡報是當天最令人印象深刻的演講之一。
questions.highlight: Ava's presentation was one of the most impressive talks of the day.

questions.prompt: Applicants found the final interview more stressful than every other stage of the application process.
questions.promptZh: 申請人認為最後面試比申請過程的其他所有階段都更有壓力。
questions.answer: The final interview was the most stressful stage of the application process.
questions.answerZh: 最後面試是申請過程中壓力最大的階段。
questions.highlight: The final interview was the most stressful stage of the application process.

questions.prompt: Few ways of reducing office waste are as simple as recycling paper.
questions.promptZh: 很少有減少辦公室廢物的方法像回收紙張一樣簡單。
questions.answer: Recycling paper is one of the simplest ways to reduce office waste.
questions.answerZh: 回收紙張是減少辦公室廢物最簡單的方法之一。
questions.highlight: Recycling paper is one of the simplest ways to reduce office waste.

questions.prompt: No other place in the house is as safe for keeping these tablets away from children as this medicine cupboard.
questions.promptZh: 屋內沒有其他地方像這個藥物櫃一樣，能安全地把這些藥片放在兒童接觸不到之處。
questions.answer: This medicine cupboard is the safest place in the house to keep these tablets away from children.
questions.answerZh: 這個藥物櫃是屋內存放這些藥片、避免兒童接觸的最安全地方。
questions.highlight: This medicine cupboard is the safest place in the house to keep these tablets away from children.

questions.prompt: No other method clears up a misunderstanding as effectively as asking direct questions.
questions.promptZh: 沒有其他方法能像直接提問一樣有效地消除誤會。
questions.answer: Asking direct questions is the most effective way to clear up a misunderstanding.
questions.answerZh: 直接提問是消除誤會最有效的方法。
questions.highlight: Asking direct questions is the most effective way to clear up a misunderstanding.

questions.prompt: Very few public buildings in the district are as easy for everyone to enter and use as the community centre.
questions.promptZh: 區內很少有公共建築物像社區中心一樣方便所有人進入和使用。
questions.answer: The community centre is one of the most accessible public buildings in the district.
questions.answerZh: 社區中心是區內最方便不同人士使用的公共建築物之一。
questions.highlight: The community centre is one of the most accessible public buildings in the district.

questions.prompt: Which part affects this study session more than any other? The first twenty minutes do.
questions.promptZh: 哪個部分比其他部分都更影響這次溫習的成效？最初二十分鐘。
questions.answer: The first twenty minutes are the most important part of this study session.
questions.answerZh: 最初二十分鐘是這次溫習最重要的部分。
questions.highlight: The first twenty minutes are the most important part of this study session.

questions.prompt: We faced several problems on our journey. None was as serious as the train delay.
questions.promptZh: 我們在旅途中遇到數個問題。沒有一個像火車延誤那麼嚴重。
questions.answer: The train delay was the most serious problem we faced on our journey.
questions.answerZh: 火車延誤是我們旅途中遇到最嚴重的問題。
questions.highlight: The train delay was the most serious problem we faced on our journey.

questions.prompt: Only a few lessons I have learnt from working in a team are as valuable as this one.
questions.promptZh: 我從團隊合作中學到的道理中，只有少數像這個道理一樣寶貴。
questions.answer: This is one of the most valuable lessons I have learnt from working in a team.
questions.answerZh: 這是我從團隊合作中學到最寶貴的道理之一。
questions.highlight: This is one of the most valuable lessons I have learnt from working in a team.

questions.prompt: Keeping a written record prevents important details from being forgotten better than any other method.
questions.promptZh: 保留書面紀錄比其他任何方法都更能防止重要細節被遺忘。
questions.answer: Keeping a written record is the best way to prevent important details from being forgotten.
questions.answerZh: 保留書面紀錄是防止重要細節被遺忘的最佳方法。
questions.highlight: Keeping a written record is the best way to prevent important details from being forgotten.

questions.prompt: The company has produced several versions of the website, but none is as easy to use as the updated one.
questions.promptZh: 公司製作過數個網站版本，但沒有一個像更新版本那麼容易使用。
questions.answer: The updated website is the most user-friendly version the company has produced.
questions.answerZh: 更新後的網站是公司製作過最方便使用的版本。
questions.highlight: The updated website is the most user-friendly version the company has produced.

questions.prompt: After 6 p.m., fewer passengers use the evening bus than any other service.
questions.promptZh: 晚上六時後，乘搭晚間巴士的乘客比其他任何班次都少。
questions.answer: The evening bus is the least crowded service after 6 p.m.
questions.answerZh: 晚上六時後，晚間巴士是最不擠迫的班次。
questions.highlight: The evening bus is the least crowded service after 6 p.m.

questions.prompt: Only a few tasks the students completed this term gave them as much satisfaction as the science project.
questions.promptZh: 學生本學期完成的任務中，只有少數像科學專題一樣令他們有滿足感。
questions.answer: The science project was one of the most rewarding tasks the students completed this term.
questions.answerZh: 科學專題是學生本學期完成過最有成就感的任務之一。
questions.highlight: The science project was one of the most rewarding tasks the students completed this term.

questions.prompt: Comparing several sources gives more reliable results than any other method when you decide whether a claim is true.
questions.promptZh: 當你判斷一項說法是否真確時，比較多個資料來源比其他任何方法都能帶來更可靠的結果。
questions.answer: Comparing several sources is the most reliable way to decide whether a claim is true.
questions.answerZh: 比較多個資料來源是判斷一項說法是否真確最可靠的方法。
questions.highlight: Comparing several sources is the most reliable way to decide whether a claim is true.
